phonetic: 藞su藧p蓹m忙n; 藞sju藧p蓹m忙n
meaning: n.鍏锋湁瓒呬汉鑳藉姏鐨勪汉,瓒呬汉
examples: Collor nurtured the idea that he was a superman, who single-handedly could resolve Brazil's crisis.
They decided to call him Superman instead.
In print, even more than in movies and on TV, Superman continues to be a juggernaut.
Batman reminds Superman that he is a better person than Batman will ever be.
